allow: PowerShell($env:npm_config_cache = "C:\\Mashira\\npm-cache"; Set-Location "C:\\Mashira\\ClaudeCode Examples\\PersonalExpenseTracker"; npx --yes create-react-app frontend 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell(@\(25412, 13088, 37516\) | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "Still running: $\($r.Content\)" } else { "Port 8000 is now free" })
